Package de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast

Interface ExpressionContainer

All Known Subinterfaces:
ConstructorReference, MemberReference, MethodOrConstructorReference, ProgramConstruct, TypeReference
All Known Implementing Classes:
AllFields, AllObjects, ArrayInitializer, ArrayLength, ArrayPostDecl, ArrayReference, Assert, Assignment, BinaryAnd, BinaryAndAssignment, BinaryNot, BinaryOperator, BinaryOr, BinaryOrAssignment, BinaryXOr, BinaryXOrAssignment, Case, ComparativeOperator, Conditional, ConstructorCall, CopyAssignment, CreateObject, Divide, DivideAssignment, DLEmbeddedExpression, Do, DoBreak, EnhancedFor, EnhancedForElimination, Equals, EvaluateArgs, ExactInstanceof, ExpandMethodBody, ExpressionJumpStatement, FieldReference, FieldSpecification, For, ForInitUnfoldTransformer, ForToWhile, ForUpdates, GreaterOrEquals, GreaterThan, If, InitArray, InitArrayCreation, Instanceof, Intersect, IsStatic, LessOrEquals, LessThan, LogicalAnd, LogicalNot, LogicalOr, LoopScopeBlock, LoopStatement, MergePointStatement, MethodCall, MethodReference, Minus, MinusAssignment, Modulo, ModuloAssignment, MultipleVarDecl, Negative, New, NewArray, NotEquals, Operator, ParenthesizedExpression, PassiveExpression, Plus, PlusAssignment, Positive, PostDecrement, PostIncrement, PostWork, PreDecrement, PreIncrement, ProgramSV, ProgramTransformer, ReattachLoopInvariant, Return, SchematicFieldReference, SchemaTypeReference, SeqConcat, SeqGet, SeqIndexOf, SeqLength, SeqPut, SeqReverse, SeqSingleton, SeqSub, SetMinus, SetUnion, ShiftLeft, ShiftLeftAssignment, ShiftRight, ShiftRightAssignment, Singleton, SpecialConstructorCall, SpecialConstructorReference, StaticInitialisation, Subtype, SuperConstructorReference, SuperReference, Switch, SwitchToIf, SynchronizedBlock, ThisConstructorReference, Throw, Times, TimesAssignment, TypeCast, TypeOf, TypeOperator, TypeRef, TypeReferenceImp, Unpack, UnsignedShiftRight, UnsignedShiftRightAssignment, UnwindLoop, VariableSpecification, While
public interface ExpressionContainer extends NonTerminalProgramElement
Expression container. taken from COMPOST and changed to achieve an immutable structure
